insight.headline: Storefront API Update
insight.what_changed: The Storefront API now supports the @inContext directive with an optional channelId argument, allowing developers to apply a specific sales channel's context to an entire query. This change is available in Storefront API version 2026-10. The @inContext directive can be used to fetch data specific to a particular sales channel.
insight.developer_impact: Developers using the Storefront API should update their queries to include the channelId argument when necessary. This change enables more flexibility in querying data specific to different sales channels. Developers should review their existing queries and update them to take advantage of this new feature. The GraphQL Admin API and other APIs remain unchanged.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will benefit from more accurate and sales channel-specific data in their storefronts, potentially leading to improved customer experiences.
insight.why_it_matters: This update provides more flexibility and accuracy in querying sales channel-specific data, which is crucial for merchants with multiple sales channels. It enables developers to build more tailored and effective storefronts.

also_worth_knowing.text: Metafield triggers and additional topics are now available for Events
Liquid templates can now compose pages with blocks and partials
Full-stack capabilities to power app analytics

updates.title: Metafield triggers and additional topics are now available for Events
updates.summary: Metafield triggers and additional topics are now available for Events, allowing apps to subscribe to events for various objects and metafield changes.

updates.title: Liquid templates can now compose pages with blocks and partials
updates.summary: Liquid templates can now compose pages with blocks and partials, simplifying theme page building.

updates.title: Full-stack capabilities to power app analytics
updates.summary: Full-stack capabilities are now available to power app analytics, simplifying the process of building merchant-facing analytics.

updates.title: Physical inventory feature preview
updates.summary: The physical inventory feature preview is now available, providing early access to new inventory APIs in the unstable version of the GraphQL Admin API.
CLI version 4.5.2 fixes a warning when running theme commands in valid theme directories and bumps Shopify/theme-tools packages.

updates.title: Card deposit endpoint now requires mTLS certificate
updates.summary: The card deposit endpoint now requires a Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate, affecting apps that store cardholder data.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.2
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI version 13.0.2 adds non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags and allows bypassing confirmation prompts in hydrogen upgrade.

updates.title: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app
updates.summary: Updated App Store requirements include using a unique name for your app to reduce merchant confusion.

updates.title: Storefront API `@inContext` supports `channelId`
updates.summary: The Storefront API @inContext directive now supports channelId, allowing for applying a specific sales channel's context to an entire query.

updates.title: `productId`, `title`,`variantSku`, and `variantTitle` fields added to `ExchangeLineItem`
updates.summary: The ExchangeLineItem type now includes productId, title, variantSku, and variantTitle fields.

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: POS UI Extensions API version 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components, allowing apps to access component-level discount allocations.

recap.headline: Shopify updates bring new events, Liquid templates, and full-stack analytics capabilities

themes.title: New Events and Triggers
themes.detail: Metafield triggers and additional topics are now available for Events, allowing apps to subscribe to events for Order, Collection, InventoryItem, and more. This update also includes metafield changes on Product, Order, Customer, Collection, and Location.

themes.title: Liquid Templates and Theme Updates
themes.detail: The Liquid July ’26 developer preview introduces a simpler way to build theme pages with blocks and partials, and the CLI has been updated to version 4.5.2 with fixes and package bumps.

themes.title: New Features and Security Updates
themes.detail: The physical inventory feature preview is now available, and the card deposit endpoint now requires a Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate for added security.

actions.text: Update apps to use new events and metafield triggers
Test physical inventory feature preview on a development store
Obtain a Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate for card deposit endpoint
